info.title: Disco API
info.description:
Disco finds novel, statistically validated patterns in tabular data that correlation analysis, LLMs, and hypothesis-driven approaches miss. Each pattern is tested on hold-out data with FDR-corrected p-values and checked against academic literature with citations.

**For agents:** Use `POST /v1/estimate` to check cost before running, `POST /v1/api-keys` to create an API key, and `GET /v1/runs/{run_id}/results` to fetch analysis results.

**Authentication:** Clerk session tokens or `disco_` API keys via `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header.

**SDK:** `pip install discovery-engine-api` — [Full docs](https://disco.leap-labs.com/llms-full.txt)

get.description:
Returns the complete analysis results for a run, including all discovered patterns with conditions, p-values, novelty scores, and citations. Also includes LLM-generated summary, column statistics, correlation matrix, and feature importance.

If the run is still processing, `status` will be `"processing"` and result fields will be empty arrays. Poll this endpoint until `status` is `"completed"` (typically 3-15 minutes).

If the run failed, `status` will be `"failed"` and `error_message` will explain why.
List all API keys for the current user. Key values are not returned — only metadata.

schema.title: Response List Api Keys V1 Api Keys Get

post.description: Create a new API key for an existing authenticated user. For first-time users, this also provisions a personal organization, Stripe customer, and free-tier subscription (idempotent — safe to call multiple times). The `key` field is returned only once — store it securely. For zero-touch agent signup (no auth required), use POST /v1/signup instead.

delete.description: Permanently revoke an API key. This action cannot be undone.

parameters.name: key_id

schema.description: The ID of the API key to delete
schema.title: Key Id

parameters.description: The ID of the API key to delete

post.summary: Recommend columns to exclude from analysis
post.description: Uses domain-aware LLM analysis to identify columns that should be excluded due to being identifiers, data leakage, or tautological/definitional relationships.

get.description: Returns the current authenticated user's profile and session information.
Returns all organizations the current user belongs to. Use the returned `id` values as the `X-Organization-ID` header for endpoints that require it.
Returns all analysis runs for the current user with their current status, job info, and report links. Use this to monitor running analyses or find past results.

Public endpoint — no authentication required. Returns all available subscription plans with pricing, credit allowances, and feature lists. Credits cost $1.00 each. Credit packs of 20 ($20) are available on all plans. Use this to show users their options before they sign up or upgrade.

post.summary: Estimate cost and time for an analysis
post.description: Estimate the credit cost, time, and feasibility of a Disco analysis before committing. Always call this before running a private analysis. Returns credit cost, estimated duration, format limits, and (if authenticated) whether you have sufficient credits. Authentication is optional — unauthenticated requests omit the `account` field.

get.description: Returns current plan, available credits (subscription + purchased), payment method status, and Stripe identifiers. Use this to check credit balance before running a private analysis.

post.description: Attach a Stripe payment method to your account. The payment method must be tokenized via Stripe's API first (using the `stripe_publishable_key` from `POST /v1/api-keys` or `GET /v1/account`) — card details never touch Disco. Required before purchasing credits or subscribing to a paid plan.

Purchase Disco credits using a stored payment method. Credits cost $1.00 each, sold in packs of 20 ($20/pack). Requires a payment method on file (attach one via `POST /v1/account/payment-method`). Returns 402 if no payment method is attached.

Subscribe to or change your Disco plan. Available plans: Explorer (free, 10 credits/mo), Researcher ($49, 50 credits/mo), Team ($199, 200 credits/mo). Paid plans require a payment method on file. Credits roll over on paid plans. Use `GET /v1/plans` to see all plan details.

Zero-touch signup for agents. Validates the email address and sends a 6-digit verification code. Follow up with POST /v1/signup/verify to complete signup and receive an API key.

If the email service is unavailable, falls back to direct provisioning and returns the API key immediately (same as a 201 response from /v1/signup/verify).

Returns 409 if the email is already registered.

post.summary: Verify email and complete account creation
post.description:
Complete signup by submitting the verification code sent to the email address. Creates the account and returns a ready-to-use API key.

Codes expire after 15 minutes and can only be used once.

on_file.title: On File

stripe_publishable_key.title: Stripe Publishable Key
stripe_publishable_key.description: Stripe publishable key for client-side payment method tokenization

card_last4.description: Last 4 digits of the attached card

reasoning.title: Reasoning
reasoning.description: Brief summary of domain analysis and exclusion decisions

key.description: The API key value (shown only once — store it securely)

stripe_publishable_key.title: Stripe Publishable Key
stripe_publishable_key.description: Stripe publishable key for client-side payment method tokenization

url.title: Url
url.description: Direct URL to this dashboard page

description.title: Description
description.description: What the user will find on this page

summary.description: AI-generated overview with key insights and novel findings

patterns.description: Full list of discovered patterns with statistics, citations, and interactive visualisations

features.description: Feature importance rankings, column statistics, and correlations

territory.description: Interactive 3D map showing how patterns select different regions of the data

sufficient.title: Sufficient
sufficient.description: Whether available credits cover the estimated cost

credits.title: Credits
credits.description: Credit cost for this analysis (0 for public runs)

free_alternative.title: Free Alternative
free_alternative.description: Whether a free public alternative exists

max_analysis_depth.title: Max Analysis Depth
max_analysis_depth.description: Maximum depth iterations for this dataset

num_columns.title: Num Columns
num_columns.description: Number of columns in the dataset

name.title: Name
name.description: Exact column name from the dataset

explanation.title: Explanation
explanation.description: One-sentence explanation of why this column is excluded

target_change_direction.title: Target Change Direction
target_change_direction.description: 'max' or 'min' — which extreme this pattern drives

support_count.title: Support Count
support_count.description: Number of rows matching this pattern

support_percentage.title: Support Percentage
support_percentage.description: Fraction of dataset matching this pattern

novelty_explanation.title: Novelty Explanation
novelty_explanation.description: Why this pattern is novel or known

tier.title: Tier

price_usd.title: Price Usd

monthly_credits.title: Monthly Credits
monthly_credits.description: Credits included per month (null for enterprise)

credit_price_usd.title: Credit Price Usd

credit_pack_price_usd.title: Credit Pack Price Usd
credit_pack_price_usd.description: Price per credit pack in USD

report_id.title: Report Id

name.title: Name
